description_long: This object is a glass jar with a metallic, gold-colored screw-on lid, containing dark green leafy plant material. The jar is transparent, allowing the contents to be clearly visible from all sides. A white paper label is affixed to the front, handwritten in green ink with Cyrillic script, identifying the contents. The leafy material inside appears densely packed, suggesting a preserved or medicinal herb. The jar's surface is glossy and reflective, especially on the lid and glass body. There are no visible brand logos or tamper-evident features on the exterior.
description: A clear glass jar with a gold metal lid, filled with dark green leafy material and labeled in Cyrillic script.
description_view_0: Front view shows the jar's gold lid and the leafy green contents through the clear glass, with no label visible.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals part of the white handwritten label on the jar, with leafy contents still visible.
description_view_2: Full front label view, displaying the handwritten Cyrillic text prominently on the jar.
description_view_3: Rear view of the jar, showing only the leafy contents through the glass, with the label edge barely visible.
